insights.title: Forecast → — App Total Revenue likely steady next period — App Total New Subs in line with upstream.
insights.body: App Total New Subs +4.7% moves with its upstream (App Total New User -2.8%, App Total Install -4.4%); no outsized App Total Revenue swing expected from the trial cohort next period.

insights.title: Lead–lag check — App Total Revenue is tracking its subs signal as expected.
insights.body: App Total Revenue this wk vs prior wk = -4.5% tracks its 7-day driver App Total New Subs prior wk vs the week before = -4.4% — revenue is following the subs signal as expected.

insights.title: Funnel conversion — Conversion to New Subs splits by app — YMK surging (+15.8% vs upstream -3.7%).
insights.body: Upstream→New Subs conversion splits by app: YMK +15.8% vs upstream -3.7% (conversion surging); All App +4.7% vs upstream -3.6% (conversion surging). (Revenue is downstream and lags ~7d — see the lead–lag check.)

insights.title: Broad-based — App Total Revenue down across every app — broad-based, look for a platform-wide cause.
insights.body: App Total Revenue is down across every app (All App -4.5%, YMK -4.8%, YCP -4.8%) — a broad move, so look for a platform-wide cause, not an app-specific one.
